'''zhashate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lollingly|lollingly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-sh-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lollingly|lollingly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhashate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:zhashate|zhashate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhashatesher|zhashatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhashatesherĂ«m|zhashatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhashatero|zhashatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhashateshĂ«|zhashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhashateshĂ«m|zhashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhashatero|gokizhashatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhashateshĂ«|gokizhashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhashateshĂ«m|gokizhashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhashankerom|gozhashankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhashankeshĂ«|gozhashankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhashankeshĂ«m|gozhashankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhashankeya|gozhashankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhashaterom|zhashaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhashatemu|zhashatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhashateya|zhashateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhashaterom|gokizhashaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhashatemu|gokizhashatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhashateya|gokizhashateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhashashate|zhashashate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhashashatesher|zhashashatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhashashatesherĂ«m|zhashashatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhashashatero|zhashashatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhashashateshĂ«|zhashashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhashashateshĂ«m|zhashashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhashashatero|gokizhashashatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhashashateshĂ«|gokizhashashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhashashateshĂ«m|gokizhashashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhashashankerom|gozhashashankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhashashankeshĂ«|gozhashashankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhashashankeshĂ«m|gozhashashankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhashashankeya|gozhashashankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhashashaterom|zhashashaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhashashatemu|zhashashatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhashashateya|zhashashateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhashashaterom|gokizhashashaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhashashatemu|gokizhashashatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhashashateya|gokizhashashateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhĂŠshĂŠte|zhĂŠshĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhĂŠshĂŠtesher|zhĂŠshĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠshĂŠtesherĂ«m|zhĂŠshĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhĂŠshĂŠtero|zhĂŠshĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«|zhĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m|zhĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠshĂŠtero|gokizhĂŠshĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«|gokizhĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m|gokizhĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhĂŠshĂŠnkerom|gozhĂŠshĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«|gozhĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gozhĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhĂŠshĂŠnkeya|gozhĂŠshĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhĂŠshĂŠterom|zhĂŠshĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠshĂŠtemu|zhĂŠshĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhĂŠshĂŠteya|zhĂŠshĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠshĂŠterom|gokizhĂŠshĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠshĂŠtemu|gokizhĂŠshĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠshĂŠteya|gokizhĂŠshĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhafshafte|zhafshafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhafshaftesher|zhafshaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafshaftesherĂ«m|zhafshaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhafshaftero|zhafshaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhafshafteshĂ«|zhafshafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafshafteshĂ«m|zhafshafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhafshaftero|gokizhafshaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhafshafteshĂ«|gokizhafshafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhafshafteshĂ«m|gokizhafshafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhafshafnkerom|gozhafshafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhafshafnkeshĂ«|gozhafshafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhafshafnkeshĂ«m|gozhafshafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhafshafnkeya|gozhafshafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhafshafterom|zhafshafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafshaftemu|zhafshaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhafshafteya|zhafshafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhafshafterom|gokizhafshafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhafshaftemu|gokizhafshaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhafshafteya|gokizhafshafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
